pi_items.source: Schema analysis via export_result.sh SQL query: SELECT provider_no FROM provider; Format is realistic 6-digit numeric provider identifier matching OSCAR EMR standard
Realistic surname; matches OSCAR EMR provider table column definition via export_result.sh
Realistic given name; matches OSCAR EMR provider table column definition via export_result.sh
Verified via worldemr.org knowledge base: 'doctor' is a valid provider_type in OSCAR EMR. Export query confirms provider_type field exists in schema.

Verified via American Academy of Family Physicians (AAFP) and American Medical Association (AMA): Family Medicine is an established medical specialty. OSCAR EMR specialty field documented to support specialization codes per World EMR knowledge base.
Standard abbreviation for Female. Confirmed in export_result.sh SQL query: SELECT sex FROM provider. Schema supports single-character gender field.

Verified format: 416 is Toronto, Ontario area code (Wikipedia/area code authorities). 555-0199 is within reserved fictional range (555-0100 to 555-0199) per Wikipedia Fictitious_telephone_number. Intentional placeholder appropriate for test data. Realistic Canadian phone format per global call forwarding standards.
Numeric status field confirmed in export_result.sh SQL query. Value '1' is realistic standard healthcare system convention for 'Active' status.
Realistic username format following convention of first initial + last name (e.g., e + watson = ewatson). Confirmed in export_result.sh SQL query: SELECT user_name FROM security.
Verified via OSCAR EMR documentation (World EMR): PIN must be at least 4 digits. '2234' meets requirement and is realistic test value.
Confirmed as default OSCAR EMR system user in setup_oscar.sh (line 5: 'Default login: oscardoc') and World EMR user management documentation.

Verified via docker-compose.yml (line 13: MYSQL_PASSWORD: oscar). While standard OSCAR default is 'mac2002' per OSCAR EMR Confluence documentation, this specific deployment uses 'oscar' as configured. Setup script explicitly documents this custom password.
Confirmed as default OSCAR EMR PIN in setup_oscar.sh (line 5: 'PIN: 1117'). Standard default per OSCAR EMR installation guides and Confluence documentation.

privileged_info_summary: This task creates a synthetic test healthcare provider record in OSCAR EMR (an open-source Canadian electronic medical record system). All metadata values are realistic and verified: Provider 'Emily Watson' (ID: 100123) is a realistic doctor in Family Medicine specialty; phone number 416-555-0199 uses real Toronto area code with intentional fictional placeholder 555 exchange; login credentials (oscardoc/oscar/PIN:1117) match this task's Docker OSCAR configuration; and security record username 'ewatson' with PIN 2234 follow realistic naming patterns. No real patient or provider data is involved—all values are synthetic test data created for task automation.
